title: Schaueria calycotricha
taxonomy: Schaueria calycotricha is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Schaueria, which is a group of flowering plants native to Madagascar. The species is further categorized as Schaueria calycotricha within the genus. Within the family Rubiaceae, it is placed in the subfamily Ixoroideae. The classification of Schaueria calycotricha is a way to understand its evolutionary relationships and place it within the larger context of plant taxonomy.
